{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abidan shield
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Abidan shield]] cannot be restored by [[Shen]] on his own.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
